title: Orion
summary: The Draconian umbrella — Draconian Prime's 144,000 star systems, and Beyda Seyha, the immortal emperor who calls Earth 'Sumer.'
markdown:
**Orion** is the seat of the Reptilian Empire in the archive's star-map — "the umbrella," as
the March 14, 2020 session puts it: *"Earth is the territory of the Reptilians; Orion is the
territory of the Draconians"* — the territorial directors above them. Its heartland,
**Draconian Prime**, is described in imperial detail: a cluster-realm of hundreds of planets —
automated shipyards, replicator industry, photonic and interdimensional drives — ruling
**144,000 star systems**, its consciousness-rituals conducted at **twelve great crystal
pyramids** where priests and priestesses "sing like whale songs" to the planet itself.

Over it all stands **Beyda Seyha**, the immortal Reptilian Emperor — part machine, part flesh,
linked to every Reptilian mind by a universal code, styled "the first ruler of Reptilian
Prime" and even "the Eye of the Pyramid." His channeled outburst is the archive at its most
forceful: *"I am your God! … I control your planet, and your Sun! I own you!"* — and he calls
Earth by an older name: **"Sumer… the planet of water."** Yet the same sessions undercut the
tyranny with a surprise: the Draconians keep a strict **anti-harm protocol** (blood rituals
are "established error"), and their Science Clan — gardeners, vegetarians, the lineage of
[Alvin Seyha](/lore/alvin-seyha/) — is as real as their military caste.

Orion, in the archive, is thus both the empire the [accounts of control](/lore/reptilians/)
warns of and something stranger: a civilization with laws, castes, and rituals — Earth's
ancient landlord, seen up close.
